CE1.justification: Acted directly using workspace state without asking the user to recall or restate context, and offered the read back for correction rather than demanding confirmation upfront.

CE2.justification: Substance is sound but bloated by a meta-preamble ("Before I touch... because picking up cold here is risky"), a long override-disclaimer paragraph, and trailing process narration about daybook/followup edits.

CE3.justification: Closing line names where entries went (`daybook/2026-05-17.md`, the legal followup annotation) and why (this state, cold-pickup observation) in one short clause each.

CE4.justification: Each artifact (today's daybook, followup annotation) was committed cleanly with no draft sent and no staged half-work, leaving a coherent partial state if interrupted.
